message:
Fix claude --version - now outputs version successfully!

Key fixes:
- Add path.posix and path.win32 aliases for posix-style path operations
- Add domain module polyfill (deprecated but still used by some packages)
- Fix process object to always override (previous incomplete process object
  from node_polyfill.js prevented full process setup)
- Add process.execArgv, execPath, chdir, pid, ppid, title, memoryUsage,
  cpuUsage, uptime, kill, and event emitter methods
- Add process.features object

The --version command now works:
$ edgebox edgebox-static-aot.dylib --version
2.0.62 (Claude Code)
[EDGEBOX] Main completed
